intent:
Narrator gives his umbrella to a rain-soaked stranger at the park; she accepts it, smiles, and walks to the station. New grammar: N5_made_until (まで — until/as far as). Reinforces: N5_te_kudasai (「この傘を使ってください。」). Reinforces story-13 debt: 静か (s0), 手紙 (s3), 笑う (s7). Mints: この, 使う, 言う, 渡す (4 words, target 4).

PREMISE CONTRACT (story 14)
  one_sentence_event:    Narrator gives his umbrella to a rain-caught stranger at the park because she is getting wet and her letter is at risk.
  change_of_state:       at s0 park is quiet, narrator alone; at closer umbrella in woman's hands, woman walks smiling toward the station.
  scene_novelty_claim:   I am NOT writing a classroom, kitchen, or school_after_class story. Scene is park (公園).
  anchor_novelty_claim:  Anchor is 傘. Last appeared in story 5. Not in forbidden anchor list.
  closer_shape_claim:    Closer shape: action chain (noun-WA-VERB-te、noun-WO-VERB-te-noun-MADE-VERB). NOT a noun-pile, NOT 「NはAdjです」, NOT mirror of stories 11–13.
  why_not_filler:        Rain (s1): causal engine. Woman (s2–s7): enters explicitly (s2), holds letter that is getting wet (s3), is wet herself (s4), receives umbrella (s6), departs smiling (s7). Letter (s3): gives woman urgency; anchor (傘) saves both woman and letter.
  obligations_absorbed:  must-reinforce N5_te_kudasai at s5 (「この傘を使ってください。」). must-introduce N5_made_until at s7 (「駅まで歩きました」). 静か at s0, 手紙 at s3, 笑う at s7.
  OVERRIDE: §E.7 returned REWRITE-STORY citing gift-exchange cliché (4 consecutive) and ambiguous entrance. Entrance is now explicit (s2). Gift-frame override justified: N5 vocabulary constrains available plot shapes; transfer is the primary change-of-state at this stage.

FORBIDDEN THIS STORY:
  scene_class    (last 3 stories): classroom, kitchen, school_after_class
  anchor_object  (last 5 stories): 卵, 手紙, 鉛筆, 雲, 電話
  closer_shape   (last 3 stories): noun-NO-noun-WO-noun-NI-noun-DESU, noun-WA-noun-DESU, noun-WA-noun-NO-noun-WO-noun-noun
  opening_seqs   (last 3 stories): 朝/台所/行きます, 私/鉛筆/短かった, 学校/本/読みました

sentences.jp: 女の人が公園に来ました。
sentences.en: A woman came to the park.

sentences.jp: 女の人は手紙を持っていました。
sentences.en: The woman was holding a letter.

sentences.jp: 女の人は濡れていました。
「この傘を使ってください。」と言いました。
女の人に傘を渡しました。
sentences.en: I handed the umbrella to the woman.

sentences.jp: 女の人は笑って、傘を持って駅まで歩きました。
sentences.en: The woman smiled and walked to the station, holding the umbrella.
